name: Transit-Mixed Concrete Ltd
summary: Transit-Mixed Concrete Ltd, an investment holding company, manufactures, supplies, and sells ready-mixed concrete in Singapore and Malaysia. The company operates through three segments: Ready-Mixed Concrete, Concrete Pumping Services, and Waste Management Services. It is also involved in the rental of concrete pumping services; and trading of spare parts, pipes, and accessories of concrete pump business, as well as sells new and used concrete pumping equipment, including concrete placing booms, and mobile and stationary concrete pumps. In addition, the company offers waste management services, such as sewer pipeline inspection services with video camera, as well as sewer pipeline and grease-interceptor cleaning services. Further, it is involved in the provision of batching services; and rental of truck mixers. The company was incorporated in 1979 and is based in Singapore.
